title: Crunchy Dutch Bhuna Fried Rice
description: A flavorful and low-sodium-friendly take on traditional Dutch fried rice, featuring the sweet and tangy taste of balsamic vinegar and the spicy kick of bhuna. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner and can be customized to suit any taste.

ingredients.name: Mixed Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Choose low-sodium options like green beans, carrots, and peas

instructions: Heat a large non-stick skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until they're tender, about 3 minutes.
Add the protein of choice and cook until it's browned and cooked through.
Add the cooked Basmati Rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Add the Bhuna Sauce, Balsamic Vinegar, and salt-free seasoning blend to the skillet and stir-fry for another minute.
Transfer the mixture to a serving platter and garnish with chopped green onions.
